THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAUL, VIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIPSON, JEFF THOMPSON, TOM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NOT AT ISSUE $5,904.00 RENT, $507.00 COSTS, $6,594.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,005.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAUL, VIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIPSON, JEFF THOMPSON, TOM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 62 CRAGMONT AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94116, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ***PLEASE INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
